steps.title: Find the original total
steps.content:
The total score for all $8$ players is the mean times the number of players.
$$16.5\cdot 8=132$$

steps.title: Find the remaining total
steps.content:
After the highest score is removed, the remaining $7$ players have a mean of $14$.
$$14\cdot 7=98$$

steps.title: Subtract the two totals
steps.content: The removed score is the difference between the original total and the remaining total. $$132-98=34$$ The answer is C.
